testsuite.name: tests.SearchTests

testcase.name: fillFormTest()

failure.message: Invalid element state [#hobbiesWrapper > div.col-md-9.col-sm-12 > div:nth-child(1) > label]: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (555, 579). You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.13.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
